nasb.text: And when they heard this, they lifted their voices to God with one accord and said, “O Lord, it is You who made the heaven and the earth and the sea, and all that is in them,

esv.text: And when they heard it, they lifted their voices together to God and said, “Sovereign Lord, who made the heaven and the earth and the sea and everything in them,

cnv.text: 他們聽了，就同心向　神高聲說：“主啊，你是那創造天地、海洋和其中萬物的主宰。

ccb.text: 大家听后，一同高声向上帝祷告说：“主啊，你创造了天地、海洋和其中的万物。

csbs.text: 他们听了，就同心合意地高声向神说：“主啊，你是造了天、地、海和其中万有的那一位。
